items.title: Hollander POTD Allen Iverson. Georgetown G was 1st pick in 96 by PHI. Explosive scorer who won ROY & had 5 straight 40+ point games. Criticized for being "too selfish, too out of control." Had up and down relationship w/Larry Brown but & won MVP in 01 and was a scoring machine.

items.title: In Copenhagen these days where I'm calling a few Finals games.
items.author: Morten Stig Jensen
items.body_excerpt:
In Copenhagen these days where I'm calling a few Finals games.

Seeing quite a few homemade "Pedo Trump" posters hanging around.

I'm suddenly filled with pride of my fellow countrymen.

items.title: Small question: Why did they change the Finals schedule this year?
items.author: jooraffy
items.body_excerpt: This year: Wed Fri Mon Wed Sat Tue Fri (starts on Wed instead of usual Thu, no Thu or Sun games). Previous years (2022-25): Thu Sun Wed Fri Mon Thu Sun (starts on Thu; up to 2 Thu games and 2 Sun games). I understand we have some new networks, but it's still ABC doing the…
